intent: hand off intender-app polish to an autonomous agent before going to sleep
finding: Late-night boundary crossing despite existing mitigation firing. On Apr 17 the late-night-warn.py hook fired at 21:50 local with the message 'It's after 20:00 and the user has 10h38m of active session time today...' After the nudge, the user continued sending substantive scope-defining messages at 22:13, 22:20 ('I want you to be an autonomous agent while I sleep'), 22:22, 22:24, and 23:01 ('Continue until beautiful... at least 3 hours'). The hook works mechanically but the nudge did not change behavior.
existing_mitigation: late-night-warn.py hook fired at 21:50 on 2026-04-17 but had no visible effect on user cadence in the following 70+ minutes.

intent: make the RSI nightly variance test harness ready before a planned rest day
finding: Work extended past midnight on Apr 14 into Apr 15. Real user messages at 23:44-00:33+ local. User said 'I will not be using my computer tomorrow' while setting up scheduled runs — the rest-protection plan eats its own margin.
existing_mitigation: late-night-warn.py fires after 20:00; may not re-fire across midnight cooldown.

intent: juggle router-agent setup, Claude config tweaks, and intender work across many parallel tabs in one morning
finding: Apr 17 shows manic-mode session fragmentation: 39 distinct user-driven sessions in a single day, with 13 session starts inside 07:10-11:10 local window. Three router-agent sessions within 50 seconds all just 'say hi'. Matches categories.md manic-mode signature (multiple sessions within a few hours; short bursts).
existing_mitigation: None targeted. The marathon/late-night hook covers cumulative duration but not session-count density.

intent: keep making progress on multiple apps (intender, router-agent, whisper-writer, jhana, nixos-config) across a single long day
finding: Marathon-day recurrence. Apr 17 hit 10h38m active time; day ran from 07:10 to 23:01 local. Same pattern as 2026-04-12 'marathon-sessions' proposal which chose visibility-only; five days later another 10h+ day appeared.
existing_mitigation: 2026-04-12 marathon-sessions proposal implemented as late-night-warn.py visibility nudge. By design it doesn't block work.
